title: Beastly Optimized
description:
Pretty Simple Modpack, but Extremely Improves Minecraft look and Performance.

In semi-development
body:
![Beastly Optimized ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776055b05a3ce291e89a8b33b691adf39303b154.png)

### Peformance
Thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium and others, We can delight you with excellent performance. 

### Optifine Like
We support most Optifine Features like Connected textures, Zoom, and Dynamic lights. If your Texture pack requires Optifine, it should work fine on Beastly Optimized. 
**But if your Texture pack doesn't work try download [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [EMT](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions) mods.**

### Quality Of Life 
Beastly Optimized has Quality of Life mods like Mouse Tweaks, Apple Skin, More Chat History. 

### Easy Shaders - Easy Textures
Thanks to Resourcify mod you can download and use Shader and Texture packs directly in Game!
Go to Shader or Texture Pack section and there you can see plus icon, click on it and select pack you want! **But unfortunately this mod not available in all versions.**

### Server is your Choise
Beastly Optimized does not use any content mod, so you can play on any Server you like with excellent Fps!

## FAQ
> Q: How many GB of ram does pack requires?
> 
> A: You can dedicate 2-3 GB of ram to Minecraft

> Q: How can I get even Better Performance with this pack?
> 
> A: If you have Nvidia graphics card 16xx or better,
>  you can download [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) mod,
>  that massively improves FPS and chunk loading speed 

> Q: Can I use it in my Modpack?
> 
> A: Of course, pack is fully open source!

## Issues
Mod Very Many Players is incompartible with Serene Seasons!

Mod Remove Reloading Screen can cause crash when loading resourses on Low end pc!
